sections.title: Fats
sections.narration: fat is 0.4g. saturated fat, polyunsaturated fat, and omega3 are doing most of the work. for a legume, stable carbs plus protein is the dream.

sections.title: Carbs
sections.narration: carbs is 14.5g. glycemic index, fibre, and starch are doing most of the work. for legumes, the carbs look much better when fibre and protein are both backing them up.
